0:
Lisette would send you across the realm to bring succor to those lost in love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Lisette would send you across the realm to bring succor to those lost in love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Summoning the holy powers of her ancestors, Lady Lisette has divined the identity and location of a young maiden in need of aid to convey the depths of her love. Seek out the lass─Yellow Moon of the Weavers' Guild in Ul'dah─and see what ails her.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

Summoning the holy powers of her ancestors, Lady Lisette has divined the identity and location of a young maiden in need of aid to convey the depths of her love. Seek out the lass─Yellow Moon of the Weavers' Guild in Ul'dah─and see what ails her.

65:
Yellow Moon sent you!? Bahahaha, that's a laugh!
Why would she not come to see her loyal admirer herself, hm? Hmmm!? I trust you about as far as I could throw you─actually, a fair bit less!
